programs.title: Mountain Men
programs.desc: Mike returns to the bear-infested crags of Kodiak to reclaim his mountain goat kill; Jason hunts down a wild hog to feed his family; Kidd and Harry blow up a beaver dam to save their water supply; Josh goes on the offensive against wolves.

programs.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programs.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programs.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programs.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programs.title: Secret to More Energy, Better Focus & Restful Sleep
programs.desc: MyMagnesiumTM ProClinical delivers 350 mg of highly absorbable magnesium plus clinically studied Shoden® Ashwagandha, vitamin D, Zinc, Boron, and antioxidant-rich organic blueberries—designed to support calm focus, steady energy, and deeper sleep.

programs.title: Joni Table Talk
programs.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.
